reviews.review_text: My cabin was situated in a quiet place in the caravan park.  It was clean, comfortable and  had excellent heating and hot water.  The bed was comfortable too!   I enjoyed the privacy of the  verandah out the front even though it was rather chilly.
Loved our stay at Seaspray Caravan Park.  Friendly owners, lovely grassed flat sites, immaculate a modern amenities. Highly recommend!
Very modern facilities. Excellent service and great owners. Plenty of space available on each site. Short walk to take away or the surf club. Plus its right on the 90 mile beach.

Nicely appointed caravan park, good showers and toilets. Has shared cooking area with hot water and general lounge area.

About 100m walk to the beach

Offers after hours checking via a drop box

No Dedicated ev charging in Seaspray, caravan park considering installing ev charge points. Charge at Sale or Traralgon  before driving into seaspray. Also no fuel past Longford.

Plenty of on-site units for sale as of April 2026.

Stayed for 5 nights on a powered site over the Easter period.

The sites were generous and location was great with a very short walk to the beach.

The bathrooms were ALWAYS clean and one of the cleanest we’ve stayed at.

Thank you ☺️

We have been camping here regularly for over ten years now and have always thoroughly enjoyed our stay. This year was unfortunately different. While the facilities are still great and the sites are well maintained and comfortable, no longer being allowed a fire made a huge difference to comfortability. We understand restrictions however there was not a total ban, and according to the CFA guidelines fires were permitted as long as they complied with rules, but to be told two days before our trip we can’t have a fire under any circumstances meant we had two uncomfortably cold nights. Additionally not all who booked were informed, only one party out of the three.

Then to add to that, after so many years of using our same sites with our regular booking, to be told that someone else has booked them now without checking with us first felt really rude. We understand first in best dressed, but I guess loyalty doesn’t mean much. We’ve never had an issue in the past with knowing our site is secured in our name, and reconfirming with payment upon leaving. This time we were told sorry, too bad. Will be looking for a different spot for next year, which is a shame after over a decade of happy memories.

We are annual comers and the place always welcomes our big family!! They’re always so accomodating and helpful! The place is nice and clean, well maintained. The beach is walking distance and what an added bonus to hear the waves while you’re sleeping. The place is well secured so it feels safe for the kids.
Very well managed and set out. Sites are grassy and amenities very clean.
No fires anymore, no cooking on charcoal until May 1, what a shame on those cold seasprsy days and nights to not be allowed a fire.
Wonderful, clean caravan park in a gorgeous little coastal town. Loved the beach and had a great meal at the life saving club down the road. Will definitely be back!

Toller Park! Wir waren zwei Nächte dort. Es war nicht viel los und wir hatten unserer Ruhe :) Tracy und ihr Mann sind super nette Menschen und extrem hilfsbereit. Wir haben uns direkt wohl gefühlt. Der Strand ist wunderschön und menschenleer und der General Store auf jeden Fall einen kurzen Abstecher wert!
Toiletten und duschen waren super sauber!

Thanks for helping again Tracy!
Very nice clean and good

Absolutely loved Seaspray Caravan Park!
The grass was so lush on our site and the site itself was huge!
We stayed 3 nights and were thrilled at how beautiful the beach is. The beach was flagged with surf life savers on duty.
Facilities are modern and clean and the park is right on the beach !
I loved the offer of a separate toilet for children with its own fob for secure entry.
The whole park is very clean and well managed start to finish.
The kids playground equipment looked new and well maintained and there was a great kitchen amenities / BBQ block.
Seaspray town has a lovely surfclub overlooking 90 mile beach and a cute general store - both venues had great afternoon live music  on Sunday.
Would definitely come again !

This is the best caravan park we have ever stayed in. The lush green lawns are well maintained, amenities are in immaculate condition. I have never seen a park so clean and tidy. My only suggestion is there are no trees to offer shade from the sun or the strong winds coming straight from the ocean. We had a powered site close to everything. Highly recommend.
Good location near to beach, general store and surf life saving cafe. Plenty of space with clean amenities

Lovely caravan park, friendly staff and facilities were best I've seen in a long time. Family friendly, kids can ride bikes, play games, play on playground, and of course it's close to the surf club for safe beach swimming.

Enjoyed our stay. Facilities are modern and clean.  Sites, while on the smaller size, had lovely green grass (even in Jan) and were flat.
We stay Australia weekend so while the camping ground was pack, we had no issue with noise.
The lack of trees means there is not a lot of shelter from the sun or the wind (you are right next to the beach) but beside that no complaints.
Lovely clean park with excellent access to the beach. Clean amenities, flat sites and friendly staff
Such a gem of a caravan park large grassy sites excellent amenities super clean and a couple areas for the kids to play and all right next to the beach
Very clean best caravan park
Huge caravan blocks. Clean amenities.

Great caravan park.
Good facilities and walking distance to beach, park and surf club.
This park is worth staying at! Beautiful BiG grassy sites. Amenities are super clean. 2 min walk to the beach, SLSC and general store. Will definitely be back- we loved it!
Cold, no fires and no e-scooters. The owners must be weird.

Wij waren vroeg in het seizoen waardoor wij en nog twee anderen plaats genoeg hadden. Het park ligt vlakbij de zee/strand en surflokatie.
Sanitair is groot en schoon. Het hele park straalt professioneel beheer uit.
No on site vans when I went there so now go to golden beach

We absolutely loved both the caravan park and the little town of Seaspray.
The General store is great. We had dinner at the Surf Club. Everyone was so friendly.
Mains water and a dump point.
Friendly staff.
Very flash and clean caravan park.
Definitely recommend!!!!

Seaspray Caravan Park is a beautiful, clean and well run park, with generous parking space. The facilities are clean and modern, from the amenities blocks to the wonderful kitchen/dining shared space. The staff are friendly and eager to help. The amazing beach is just at your doorstep and we had a fantastic meal at the local life-saving club. The park is all grass with paved roads, great for young children riding bikes and little scooters. The noise level was kept to a minimum, with the park very quiet by 8:30pm each night.|We will definitely be going back!
We stayed at the camp sites, always enjoy our stay, very well kept amenities, close to the beach and lovely cafe and restuarant at the surf club. Beautiful stay as always recommend!

Good spot, cafe and shop nearby, surf club also. But for the two days I was there it was blowing a gale...constantly so I sat inside my car 🚗.  I did drive around and went to check out Flamingo beach....but no flamingos.
Great location and very clean and modern amenities.
Nice spot.  Park is a bit sparse, no greenery and nothing to block the wind.

Beautiful place to stay. Lovely and helpful owners. Very clean. We took our caravan and the sites are large enough,plus only a minute walk to the beach .our second stay and we will be back. Also pet friendly.
In winter there is plenty of room . I expect summer would be pumping with the beach so close by. It’s a nice change to have the ocean waves instead of traffic as nearby noise

Wir haben eine Nacht im Februar mit unserem SUV + Dachzelt (Camp-Site 215) hier verbracht und alles in allem war es ein wunderbarer Aufenthalt. Die Sanitäranlagen und Küche sind modern, gepflegt und sauber. Ebenfalls liegt der Campingplatz nur wenige Gehminuten vom 90 Mile Beach entfernt, was wir sehr genossen haben. Allerdings ähnelt der Campingplatz einer großen grünen Wiese mit Zaun, es gibt also nur wenig Bäume und Büsche und somit wenig Schatten und Sichtschutz.

Amenities are modern and spotless.
Large spacious sites
Grounds immaculately maintained

Right next to a beautiful beach along the open ocean …. Spacious, verdant green grass, clean and modern facilities…well surfaced roads, and Tracey in the office, friendly, welcoming, and helpful. A place to stay far from the crowds.
Lovely park, so close to the beach. There’s not really any trees so could be pretty hot in summer. The sites are big, all beautiful couch grass.

A planned trip to Seaspray caravan park for a special weekend went horribly wrong when our car blew up,after returning to home thanks to RACV, i called  Ben at Seaspray CP he arranged for us to stay in a van, placed it next to our friends and we were able to enjoy our special time, the park was wonderful so clean and spacious thank you so much Ben and co...
Family spot, we love seaspray

The wifies and I are in a wee camp spot on our own and it has been absolutely wonderful even in the rain. We usually free or farm camp and don't do commercial parks as much. Seaspray is quite a cool lil park and has great amenities.
I would highly recommend for anyone and even to the die hard free campers off peak.
Amenities spotless 👍good pricing, just have to watch out for Inconsiderate dog owners who fail to clean up after there pets.

Good caravan Park..
Nice grassy sites
Big sites
Good amenities
This caravan park was so big. Spacious sites. Very clean amenities. The staff were so good always ready to help. I would totally recommend this place and would go back again
Excellent location, park staff great - ideal spot for a quiet getaway

Wir haben 3 Nächte auf dem Caravanplatz verbracht. Der Platz ist wie bereits erwähnt ohne Bäume, daher auch kein Schatten, dennoch ein schöner Platz. Die Sanitäranlagen sind modern,groß und sauber. Die Waschmaschinen ( mit heißen Wasser) und Trockner für 4 Dollar, sind sehr faire Preise. Unser Stellplatz war gut und wir hatten ausreichend Platz. Von uns klare Weiterempfehlung. Der Strand und das Meer unbeschreiblich toll, super. Wir hatten eine gute Zeit dort.

Toilets very clean and one dryer and 3 washers
Jumping pillow is in good condition and no Shade at Jumping Pillow area

Plenty of drinks stocked
Will come back again
Staff want us to come back
Please Be Aware When it’s Windy no setting Up Camping annex!
Wifi Should Be upgraded for Better Speeds and Boosters Are Setup there and 4g is good
Maybe You Get 5g in future
Modern facilities spacious but lacks spade
A wonderful location with a clean and well looked after park.

Weather was dreadful so cut our stay short but beautiful place all round. Jenny at reception was the most vibrant and welcoming person I've come across since moving to Australia. We will be back for sure!

Beautiful camping grounds across the road from the beach.  Grass areas and bathrooms and amazing.  Short walk to the surf club with amazing views and meals.  Young staff and so welcoming.  Across from surf club is a well stocked local shop.
Awesome place

This is such a beautiful well looked after park
Beautiful green manicured lawns, large sites
Great camp kitchen facilities, well maintained bathroom facilities
Would be very popular and busy during holiday times
Great village and walkable to 90 mile beach
Best caravan park we have stayed in very well maintained and very clean  ideal location.Park operators lovely and friendly
Great place and the lady at the counter is lovely

We have had four nights at the park, very impressed with staff, amenities. Beautifully kept grounds thick green grass overall the park. Ocean is accessible across the road.
More than enough things for kids to be kept entertained. Over all 10 out of 10....
.

Kim and staff made us feel very welcome on the phone and checking in.
Huge grassed sites, new amenities, spotlessly clean. Tracks over the dunes to the beach. Very few supplies available so stop in Sale to stock up.
Would recommend.
Be careful about hidden costs don't tell you about $5 surcharge on credit card they just add it and don't give you any options

Fabulous park just behind the sand dunes of the iconic 90 mile beach
Kim and the team will make you welcome from the moment you book
Facilities are A+ and the large grassed sites are fantastic to set up for an extremely enjoyable stay.  Just be mindful if there is wind when considering putting up your annex
The town has a General Store which serves great fish and chips as well as being licenced and stocking basic grocery supplies.  It also serves as the post office.   The Surf Life Saving Club was open on weekends with some genuinely serious food offerings.  The front beer garden is dog friendly and offers a great place to whale watch.   Both places are only a 300m walk from the CP.  sale is about 30 minutes away if you need to shop more seriously
If you are in the region do yourself a favour.  You will not be disappointed

Had a caravan site.
Very well maintained park.
Very nice staff,
Large sites
Pet Friendly they even give you poo bags
Clean toilets
Clean camp kitchen and facilities
Gives the Appearance of being  safe and secure,
There is not much in the way of purchasable supplies. Buy in Sale before attending.
Was windy when we were here
Very relaxed but well run park

Such a beautiful maintained caravan park. Clean facilities, seem almost brand new, grassy spot which we love and right on the beach! This did not disappoint, so clean and friendly staff! Also 2 min walk to a pump teach which the kids loved! Would definitely return and highly recommend! Also brought our dog and that was epic!!

Well where do I start, from the moment I rang to make a booking I new we were going to have a great stay, when we arrived the staff we super friendly and the park is one of the best we have stayed in, grounds were lovely and clean, amenities were super clean and it was lovely seeing all the fire pits at night time.  We will defiantly be back again in February on our way back from Tasmania to Sunshine Coast.  NO FUEL AT SEASPRAY
Had trouble with our van's electricity supply and the owner spent an hour trouble shooting for us. Amazing service, clean and well appointed.
All amenities are nice and clean, Chatty staff, large plots. 2 mins from Nine mile beach. A1+
Amazing place to have a quiet holiday.
Seaspray Caravan Park is a large park next to the beach. The sites are level with thick green grass. The amenities are modern and clean. Staff are very friendly.

Seaspray is a family staple for me and my family. We love the location, the beach and the sites. Great for bike rides, kids and dogs.
My only nitpick is that it can get pretty windy and very cold.
We love this place and I would recommend.

Fairly new caravan park. Very new and clean facilities. Ocean beach just across the road. No shade trees but you don't have to worry about branches falling on your van or tent. Highly recommended to stay here.

🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟
I am actually disappointed that we chose Seaspray Caravan Park to be our first ever trip away in our new camper.
The facilities were so nice, new and clean. The people in the front office were absolutely wonderful. The spaces are rather big and it's only a short walk to the beach.
I just know other caravan park going forward will not live up to the greatness of this park!!! Cannot wait to come back here.

An excellent caravan park, with the ability tk camp, park up a caravan or, rent a cabin. Right beside 90 mile Beach, which is spectacular and clean. Very little people around. Facilities are top notch and extremely clean. Full kitchen, and bathroom facilities are available. With a large TV and foosball table available for everyone to enjoy. Dog and child friendly. Each site has water, electricity and waste points available. Staff managing the park are fantastic, friendly, warm, welcoming and helpful. A must visit for a fantastic remote getaway.

Fabulous place to stay. Staff are very very friendly and welcoming, nothing is too much trouble and they are very flexible. Easy walk to the 90 mile beach. Amenities and surrounds are immaculate. Definitely worth a visit.

All the way from WA.... We loved this park immaculate ammentities tucked behind the magnificent vista of Bass Strait and right on the 90 mile Beach. We extended our stay on arrival because the vibe location staff and layout was so appealing. Jenny is a delightful young woman so customer service orientated with such a lovely personality...Kim equally as delightful has a gem in Jen Thankyou we will be back if and when possible and certainly will recommend this destination and Caravan Park Rhonda and Charles
Tranquillity

Super well-maintained complex right by the sea. There wasn't much going on, so we had a complete meadow opposite the jumping pillow. Seaspray is known for its wind and we could feel it, but it didn't bother us and we had a really great stay.

Such an amazing park. Beautiful grounds and the amenities are spotless. The staff are so helpful and nothing is too much trouble l. Highly recommend. Will definitely be coming back next year. Such a lovely spot. The beach is amazing and so clean.
Very clean, sparkling amenities, but lacks shade. Close to the beach but can't see it.

Recht neuer Campingplatz mit sauberen und großzügigen Amenities direkt in Strandnähe mit eigenem Zugang. Sehr sympathische Aufnahme beim Check-In. Mit AUD 70 für eine Nacht bisher der teuerste Campingplatz auf unserer Reise. Es gibt Mücken und Fliegen, nicht viele, aber immerhin. Wer also empfindlich ist, sollte Insektizid-Spray dabei haben.
Over rated for monday of long weekend

Probably one of the best caravan parks I’ve been to. Incredibly accomodating to families with kids. Great playgrounds! Park is immaculate! Great facilities which are also immaculate! Owners/staff are lovely! Right on the beach. Dog friendly. I can’t fault this place, will definitely be back! The surf life saving club which is in walking distance and also dog friendly also has very nice meals! My scotch fillet was to die for! Thank you for a great stay!

Great place.  Clean,  well maintained park.  Friendly staff. Close walk to beach. Convenient camp kitchen available to use.
We camped with our dogs. Popular place for families and dog owners.  Would recommend!
We will be back.

Well presented park, with good clean facilities. Friendly & helpful staff. Very close to 90 mile beach for fishing and walking. Just a short stroll to Seaspray surf club patrolled beach.
The club also opens for meals and drinks, but opening times may vary.
Big sites, clean amenities and extremely friendly people. Dog friendly.

This place is heaven…why???…Uber gorgeous Jenni is so welcoming and helpful, the very spacious grassy sites and amazing modern and clean facilities. One of the best sites we stayed at on our trip around Oz.Highly recommend.

The cleanest, most well maintained campsite we’ve ever stayed in!
The staff were very friendly at check in and chose us a protected site based on the wind as we were one the only people in a swag.
We didn’t realise the proximity to a RAAF base and my husband loved it and spent half the time watching the planes.
Close to a beautiful beach, the whole town was gorgeous and very quiet.
No issues with mosquitoes at all, shame we could only stay one night.
Camped last night and it couldn't have been better. We loved the amenities, the location is second to none and the check in process was a joy! We will definitely be back.

Very disappointed they refused to refund my hard earned money with plenty of cancellation notice don’t be a victim like us no mention when cancelling of not refunding money only to send them email very poorly done 👎👎👎👎

Becareful wen booking here they took my full amount but I had to cancel they refused to pay the refund their policy is extremely confusing I hope they enjoy my donation 😡😡😡😡 very dissatisfied won’t be going back there complete scam

This is a very nice camping spot, right on the beach and within walking distance of the Surf Life Saving club and local general store which serves lovely fish and chips. Staff at the camp ground are friendly and helpful and facilities are clean and reliable. With no trees it can be quite windy but this is only a minor thing considering the positives. Sites are also nice and big|For larger buys than you can get at the local store, Sale is only 30 minutes away

We just spent 8 nights at Seaspray Caravan Park over New Year, and it was fantastic. From our friendly greeting the minute we arrived to check in, to the locals at the S.L.S.C. We loved every bit of our stay at this park. The powered sites are HUGE, the amenities look near new and are serviced daily and kept at a great standard of cleanliness, with swipe cards needed to access as a safety measure, the grounds are maintained beautifully, very family friendly, respectful behaviour by all, and the lovely young girl who worked behind the very popular icy pole and lolly desk was sunshine in human form.|We loved the beach, which is as promised, a stones throw away. Dinner at the SLSC was delicious, as was the food truck, and the pump bike track was definitely a hit with the kids. All in all 5 stars, would and have been recommending to everybody. We will be back.

First time here. Great location. Staff excellent to deal with. Receptionist just a legend to deal with. Sites are a good size
Will be back...
Great spot with easy access to the beach. Campsites are grassy and fairly large with power and water available. Can get quite windy but overall a great place to unwind and relax.
Well maintained shared amenities. Campsite layout works well to move cars around the site. Ideal for camping with pets and great beach access.
Proprietors are lovely and helpful, park is very well maintained and services/facilities are excellent.
Great little spot over Christmas must book 6 months in advance as to a perfect location fishing beach like twenty minutes from shopping centre

Had a fantastic time for a three night stay for our first timers in a caravan.  |Beautiful place grounds are lovely perfect place for surf fishing staff are wonderful toilet and showers building and laundry are 5 star.  Recommend for anyone for families good jumping pillow and bike tracks.
Awesome caravan park cleanliness is the best  l have ever seen Management fabulous can't find any faults ✔✔✔
Fantastic park. Immaculate facilities.
Very well maintained, large camp sites, great clean amenities. Happy friendly staff. Highly recommend

We stayed in the one cabin on site which is right opposite reception. Absolutely no privacy what so ever and the woman at reception seemed a little odd and overbearing. Felt very uncomfortable the entire stay.  Wont be back.
Beautiful caravan park, great facilities and friendly staff.

A week ago we stayed for 10 nites the park is clean and very well maintained with new showers and toilets. The van sites are huge 10m x 16m. Jenny welcomed us with open arms. $30 pn is great value. We recommend it.
Quiet and quiet 🤫

- Friendly and relatable staff
- 11am checkout
- Dog friendly
- Allows fire pits

Would give it 6 stars if I could
